Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel A Discovery Response To Special Interrogatory No. 32 From Defendant; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Bracamontes, Esq., 415-835-6777, appearing for Travis Hellyer, Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TRAVIS HELLYER's Motion To Compel A Discovery Response To Special Interrogatory No. 32 From Defendant; Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. ALL OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,387.50, PLUS ANY ADDITIONAL FEES INCURRED FOR THE HEARING. Subject to review of the order. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
